
```{r setup-04, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(lubridate)
library(zoo)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(viridis)

df <- read_parquet("../data/processed/articles_with_sentiment.parquet") |>
  mutate(
    published_date = as.Date(published_date),
    week           = floor_date(published_date, "week"),
    bert_net       = bert_positive - bert_negative
  )

# Known major Iran-Israel events in the analysis window (Jan–Apr 2026)
# Update these based on actual events during your analysis period
events <- tibble(
  date  = as.Date(c(
    # Add real event dates here, e.g.:
    # "2026-01-15", "2026-02-20", "2026-03-10"
  )),
  label = c(
    # "Event label 1", "Event label 2", "Event label 3"
  )
)
```

## Weekly Sentiment Trends by Country

```{r weekly-trend, fig.height=8, fig.width=12}
weekly <- df |>
  group_by(country, week) |>
  summarise(
    net = mean(bert_net, na.rm = TRUE),
    n   = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p <- weekly |>
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = net, color = country, group = country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo", name = "Country") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "2 weeks", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  labs(
    title = "Weekly average net sentiment by country",
    subtitle = "Net sentiment = BERT positive − negative probability",
    x = NULL, y = "Net sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

# Add event annotations if any exist
if (nrow(events) > 0) {
  p <- p +
    geom_vline(
      data = events,
      aes(xintercept = date),
      linetype = "dotted", color = "firebrick", linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = events$date,
      y = max(weekly$net, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.9,
      label = events$label,
      angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 3, color = "firebrick"
    )
}

p
```

## 7-Day Rolling Average by Country

```{r rolling, fig.height=8, fig.width=12}
daily <- df |>
  group_by(country, published_date) |>
  summarise(net = mean(bert_net, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(country, published_date) |>
  group_by(country) |>
  mutate(rolling_net = rollmean(net, k = 7, fill = NA, align = "right")) |>
  ungroup()

daily |>
  ggplot(aes(x = published_date, y = rolling_net, color = country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo", name = "Country") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "2 weeks", date_labels = "%b %d") +
  labs(
    title = "7-day rolling average net sentiment by country",
    x = NULL, y = "Rolling avg net sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

## Small Multiples: Sentiment per Outlet Over Time

```{r small-multiples, fig.height=14, fig.width=14}
weekly_outlet <- df |>
  group_by(country, outlet_name, week) |>
  summarise(net = mean(bert_net, na.rm = TRUE), n = n(), .groups = "drop")

weekly_outlet |>
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = net, fill = net > 0)) +
  geom_col(width = 6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey40") +
  facet_wrap(country ~ outlet_name, scales = "free_x", ncol = 5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#1976D2", "FALSE" = "#D32F2F"), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b") +
  labs(
    title = "Weekly net sentiment per outlet",
    x = NULL, y = "Net sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold"),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 6)
  )
```

## Sentiment Volatility by Country

Which countries show the most *inconsistent* sentiment week-to-week?

```{r volatility, fig.height=5, fig.width=8}
weekly |>
  group_by(country) |>
  summarise(
    mean_net = mean(net, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_net   = sd(net, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = mean_net, y = sd_net, label = country)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = sd_net), color = "#1976D2", alpha = 0.8) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(size = 4) +
  scale_size_continuous(guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Sentiment volatility by country",
    subtitle = "X = average stance, Y = week-to-week consistency (higher = more volatile)",
    x = "Mean net sentiment", y = "SD of weekly net sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```
